    Serialized Form

    • Package com.societegenerale.failover.domain

      • Class com.societegenerale.failover.domain.Referential

        class Referential extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • asOf
            LocalDateTime asOf
            The timestamp at which the referential value was captured from the live source.
          • metadata
            Metadata metadata
            Additional metadata populated during failover recovery.
          • upToDate
            Boolean upToDate
            Whether the referential value is up-to-date. true means a live value; false means it was recovered from the failover store.
